svg.text: Each domain owns its own lifecycle, no shared states

g.text: Owns trip from creation to operational closure

svg.text: No "billed" state on trip — that's the invoice's job to track
Settled trips become billable line items

g.text: Owns invoices and payments — trips are just line items

svg.text: Invoice has its own status: DRAFT → SENT → PARTIAL → PAID
Trip doesn't need to know any of this

g.text: Pooled accounts with tags — no per-vehicle ledgers

svg.text: No link to trips or invoices — completely standalone
Reports join across domains when needed (vehicle profitability = revenue - expenses)
